title: pulicaria arabica subsp. hispanica
intro: Pulicaria arabica subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pulicaria arabica subsp. hispanica have been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and easing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
